scripts.ci: bun run docs:check && bun run build && bun run smoke:tools
scripts.prepare:repo: bun run docs:capabilities && bun run verify
scripts.verify: bun run ci && bun run smoke:views
scripts.docs:check: bun run scripts/generate-capabilities.ts --check && bun run docs:surfaces
scripts.smoke:views: node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs /Users/jonas/.agents/mcp/wrappers/linear.sh --call check_view_schema_drift '{"workspace":"personal"}' && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs /Users/jonas/.agents/mcp/wrappers/linear.sh --call list_views '{"workspace":"personal","first":1}'
scripts.smoke:files: bash -lc 'printf "Linear MCP upload smoke test\\nCreated: 2026-05-26\\n" > /tmp/linear-mcp-upload-smoke.txt && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs /Users/jonas/.agents/mcp/wrappers/linear.sh --call upload_file '\''{"workspace":"personal","path":"/tmp/linear-mcp-upload-smoke.txt"}'\'''
